name: UNITED BANKSHARES INC/WV
summary: PART I Organizational History and Subsidiaries United Bankshares, Inc. (United, we, us, our, or the Company) is a West Virginia corporation registered as a financial holding company pursuant to the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended. United was incorporated on March26, 1982, organized on September9, 1982, and began conducting business on May1, 1984 with the acquisition of three wholly-owned subsidiaries. Since its formation in 1982, United has acquired thirty-three banking institutions...
